creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Comment 0 was a documentation/ example, so, this is Documentation (in Bugzilla), however the scope is broader. 

website/ breakages include: 

- FreeBSD Status Report Third Quarter 2024, where 
  <https://www.freebsd.org/status/report-2024-07-2024-09/#_userspace_ufs_driver_fuse_ufs> 
  leads to a red alert (not found) for 
  <https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/sysutils/fusefs-ufs/>. 

I found that example at the foot of results from 
rg --sort path sysutils\/ /usr/doc/website/content/en
